emails.subject: Kaminski's Column
emails.body: Kaminski's Column Good Day to you, Vince! I hope you are doing well in Brazil. I didn't get your column over the weekend, so I'm not yet able to put our newsletter out this week. Would you be able to forward a copy from your laptop in the next day or two? If so, I can publish this week. Thanks and have a safe trip, Sam

emails.subject: Re: Kaminski's Column
emails.body: Re: Kaminski's Column Sam, It's coming soon. Vince --------------------------vince kaminski

emails.subject: RE: Kaminski's Column
emails.body: RE: Kaminski's Column Sam, It's coming. Vince To: Kaminski, Vince J
